Why Ferni

Everything you need, nothing you don't.

Simple, powerful AI coaching that fits your life.

Six Specialists

From career coaching to habit building, each AI is an expert in their domain.

Natural Conversation

Talk like you would with a friend. No scripts, no menus, just conversation.

Always Available

2am thoughts? Early morning motivation? Your team is ready 24/7.

Private & Secure

Your conversations stay yours. We never sell your data.

Web or Phone

Use the web app or call directly—same great experience.

Free to Start

No credit card required. Just open the app and start talking.

Meet Your Team

Six specialists. One conversation.

They work together seamlessly, so you don't have to think about who to ask.

Ferni

Life Coach

Your main guide. Helps you navigate life's big questions and connects you with the right specialist.

Jack

Investment Sage

Decades of wisdom on building wealth. Simple, timeless guidance on money and investing.

Maya

Habits & Routines

Your accountability partner for building better habits and breaking the ones holding you back.

Alex

Communications

Draft emails, prepare for tough conversations, or practice that important presentation.

Peter

Research

Digs deep into topics. Whether it's stocks, health, or career moves—thorough analysis awaits.

Jordan

Planning & Events

From vacations to life transitions, Jordan helps you plan and celebrate every milestone.

What People Say

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions.

Is Ferni really free?

Yes! Ferni is completely free to use. We believe everyone deserves access to quality life coaching. Premium features are coming soon, but the core experience will always be free.

How does the phone calling work?

Just dial our number and start talking. Ferni answers immediately—no menus, no hold times. It's a real conversation with AI.

Is my data private?

Absolutely. Your conversations are encrypted and never sold. We take privacy seriously. Check our Privacy Policy for details.

Can Ferni replace a therapist?

Ferni is a life coach, not a therapist. We're great for goal-setting, accountability, and everyday guidance. For mental health concerns, please consult a licensed professional.

How do the specialists work together?

Just talk naturally. If you mention investments, Ferni might bring in Jack. Talking about habits? Maya joins the conversation. It's seamless—you don't need to do anything special.

Ready to meet your AI team?

Start a conversation today. It's free.
